identity_traits: segmented body with alternating yellow and black bands
wasp-like wing structure with transparent membranes
short stubby legs with black tips
original_type_traits: poisonous yellow coloration on body segments

segmented body with alternating yellow and black bands
transparent wing membranes spanning from shoulder to rear

visual_facts.silhouette: The Pokémon has a wasp-like silhouette with a rounded head, segmented body, and large wings.
